emails.body: Re: Deal 505613.01 Mark looked at the confirm and said it lookes A.O.K. Sorry I'm late in getting back to you I was out sick yesterday. This weather is not helping! Thanks, Kate Stephanie Piwetz 02/02/2001 07:21 AM
